opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I got over a bad flu two weeks ago, but now my chest aches deeply, my heart is racing constantly, and I can barely walk to the bathroom without gasping.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: New deep chest ache, a constantly racing heart and breathlessness on minimal exertion, a couple of weeks after a severe flu.

symptom_narrative.onset: chest pain and racing heart over the past 3 days, two weeks after a severe viral illness
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days of variable chest ache with constant fast heartbeat and worsening breathlessness
symptom_narrative.character: a deep chest ache, slightly worse lying flat, with a constantly racing heart
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so breathless and fatigued he can barely walk to the bathroom, staying in bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: central chest ache; racing sensation in the chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: chest ache variable and slightly positional; the fast heart rate is constant even at rest
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any exertion; lying flat slightly worsens the ache
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profound fatigue, severely reduced exercise tolerance and breathlessness; denies crushing jaw pain, sweating, or recent long-haul travel
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: previously fit and well; had a bad flu two weeks ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: significantly impaired, staying in bed due to fatigue and breathlessness

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a severe flu-like viral illness two weeks ago, now recovered from the respiratory symptoms

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; previously fit and active

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: worried something is wrong with his heart after the flu; concerned about coping alone

objective_data_offered.value: about 118 bpm at rest (counted at the wrist)
